ddls:
CREATE TABLE "procurement_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement request */,
  "pq_number" TEXT /* Purchase Quotation (PQ) number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the requested service or goods */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the request was issued */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the request was closed (if applicable) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken or required (if applicable) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department making the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., Open, In Progress, Closed) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the request (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the request (e.g., Goods, Services, Both) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_requests_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_requests_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_requests_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_requests_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person for the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "budget_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget */,
  "budget_amount" TEXT /* Total amount allocated for the budget */,
  "budget_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the budget */,
  "budget_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action log */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement request the action is related to */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_by" TEXT /* User who took the action */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., Create, Update, Delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_logs_action_by FOREIGN KEY ("action_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_logs_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES procurement_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Procurement Officer, Department Manager, Admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "related_requests" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each related request entry */,
  "parent_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent procurement request */,
  "child_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child procurement request */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., Parent, Child) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_related_requests_parent_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_request_id") REFERENCES procurement_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_related_requests_child_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_request_id") REFERENCES procurement_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement request the status change is related to */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the request */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the status was changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who changed the status */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_history_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES procurement_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement request the document is associated with */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., Request Form, Contract, Invoice) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES procurement_requests ("request_id")
)
